scripts.build:dev-remote: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=dev PL_BUILD_VARIANT=all PL_BUILD_LOCATION=remote turbo run build
scripts.test: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=dev PL_BUILD_VARIANT=binary PL_BUILD_LOCATION=local turbo run test --concurrency 1
scripts.test:dry-run: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=dev PL_BUILD_VARIANT=binary PL_BUILD_LOCATION=local turbo run test --dry-run=json
scripts.upgrade-sdk: block-tools structure refresh --update-deps-only && pnpm i && block-tools structure refresh && pnpm i && pnpm fmt
scripts.build:dev-local: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=dev PL_BUILD_VARIANT=all PL_BUILD_LOCATION=local turbo run build
scripts.build:dev-no-software: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=dev PL_BUILD_VARIANT=none turbo run build
scripts.build:dev-binary-existing: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=dev PL_BUILD_USE_PUBLISHED=true turbo run build
scripts.build:release: env PL_BUILD_CHANNEL=release PL_BUILD_VARIANT=all PL_BUILD_LOCATION=remote turbo run build
